name: Nanjing Vishee Medical Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Nanjing Vishee Medical Technology Co., Ltd. develops and manufactures medical rehabilitation devices in China. It offers pelvic floor and postpartum, neurological, and mental rehabilitation solutions; and bio-stimulation feedback devices, magnetic stimulators, etc. The company's solutions cover markets, such as electrical and magnetic stimulation, electrophysiology, and other technical directions. It offers its products through dealers, sales network, and distributors to hospitals, and terminal medical and professional institutions. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Nanjing, China.
